sources_searched.finding: MATTINGLEY does not appear in Index Nominum. Surname appears only in Index Locorum (places) at pp.174, 175, 213, 214. Variant: Madingley=Mattingley confirmed.
sources_searched.significance: CONFIRMS no armigerous Mattingley family in Hampshire; family were commoners

sources_searched.finding: Peter de Mattingley conveyed to Geoffrey de Arundel ~1236. Land absorbed into Holdshot manor under Merton Priory. Rycher family at Mattingley by ~1340. No Mattingley surname in narrative 1236-1538.
sources_searched.tna_ref: CP 25/1 (Feet of Fines, Hampshire, Hillary 14 Edward III — Rycher)

sources_searched.finding: Index sections are document concordances (TNA roll numbers), not personal name indexes. Content pages for Hampshire sections checked — no Mattingley found.
